description: Ergonomic 2.4 GHz wireless mouse with USB-A nano receiver. Up to 18-month battery life on a single AA battery. DPI range 800–1600, adjustable via dedicated button. Plug-and-play, no driver required. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and Chrome OS. Dimensions: 115 × 63 × 38 mm. Weight: 101 g (without battery).
warranty: 1-year limited hardware warranty. Covers manufacturing defects. Does not cover physical damage, liquid spills, or unauthorized modifications.
shipping: Ships within 1 business day. Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Express delivery 1–2 business days at extra cost. Free standard shipping on orders over $35.

description: Full-size mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Blue switches. Per-key RGB backlighting with 16 preset lighting modes. N-key rollover for conflict-free gaming. Detachable USB-C cable, 1.8 m braided. Aluminum top plate. 104 keys. Windows, macOS, and Linux compatible. Dimensions: 440 × 135 × 40 mm. Weight: 1.2 kg.
warranty: 2-year limited hardware warranty. Covers switch and PCB defects. Keycap wear is not covered. RMA process initiated via support ticket.
shipping: Ships within 1–2 business days. Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Express delivery 1–2 business days. Free standard shipping on orders over $35.

description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub. Ports: 4K HDMI, 2× USB-A 3.0, 1× USB-C PD 100W passthrough, SD card reader, microSD card reader. Compact bus-powered design, no external power adapter needed. Aluminum shell with thermal dissipation. Cable length: 15 cm. Compatible with MacBook, iPad Pro, and any USB-C laptop.
warranty: 1-year limited hardware warranty. Port damage due to force is not covered.
shipping: Currently out of stock. Expected restock within 7–10 business days. Pre-orders available; ships as soon as stock arrives.

description: Over-ear Bluetooth 5.3 headphones with hybrid active noise cancellation (ANC). Up to 30-hour battery with ANC on; 50 hours with ANC off. Quick charge: 10 minutes charges for 3 hours of playback. Multi-device pairing for up to 2 devices simultaneously. 40 mm custom drivers, frequency response 20 Hz–20 kHz. Foldable design, included carrying case. 3.5 mm wired mode supported.
warranty: 2-year limited hardware warranty. Ear cushion wear is not covered but replacements are available for purchase.
shipping: Ships within 1 business day. Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Express delivery available. Free standard shipping on orders over $35.

description: Discontinued 5W USB-A wall charger. This product is no longer sold or supported. Limited remaining stock. No warranty coverage for new purchases. Customers are advised to purchase a modern 20W USB-C charger instead.
shipping: Ships if stock is available. No guaranteed ship date.
